ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "roll_no" INTEGER /* Roll number of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in (e.g., B.Tech, M.Tech) */,
  "batch" INTEGER /* Batch the student belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact details of the student */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the section belongs to */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section (e.g., IT3, CS1) */,
  "section_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the section */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of section (e.g., lecture, lab, tutorial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_records" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade achieved by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was recorded */,
  "grade_status" TEXT /* Status of the grade (e.g., pass, fail, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_records_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_records_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "instructor_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the instructor */,
  "instructor_designation" TEXT /* Designation of the instructor */,
  "instructor_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor offering the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is being offered (e.g., Spring 2023) */,
  "offering_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course offering */,
  "offering_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course offering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "sgpa" REAL /* SGPA of the student */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* CGPA of the student */,
  "performance_semester" TEXT /* Semester for which the performance is recorded */,
  "performance_academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for which the performance is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments by the student */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was submitted */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., mid-semester, end-semester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., Dean, HOD) */,
  "admin_designation" TEXT /* Designation of the administrator */,
  "admin_department" TEXT /* Department the administrator belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
